/usr/bin/ar qc libZamhareer.a CMakeFiles/Zamhareer.dir/src/Engine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Zamhareer.dir/src/Image.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Zamhareer.dir/src/Layer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Zamhareer.dir/src/Renderer/Opengl3_Renderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Zamhareer.dir/src/Window/glfw_impl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Zamhareer.dir/src/oaa_String.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Zamhareer.dir/src/oaa_Timer.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libZamhareer.a
